Overrides.Override: Elusive's Effect on you is increased instead for the first 2 seconds Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Agile
15% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills Auras from your Skills which affect Allies also affect Enemies Limited to 1 Runegraft of Treachery
+1 to Level of all non-Exceptional Support Gems Limited to 1 Runegraft of Gemcraft

Skill.source: Item:12:Hands of the High Templar, Crusader Gloves
Item:12:Hands of the High Templar, Crusader Gloves

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Berek's Respite Two-Stone Ring Unique ID: eaf6d97ecc6473af090e12c5e8b5963717f9145b8016cbf6647b8041f786a70a Item Level: 80 LevelReq: 20 Implicits: 1 Cannot be Poisoned Adds 27 to 58 Fire Damage to Spells and Attacks 33% increased Lightning Damage +37 to maximum Mana When you Kill a Shocked Enemy, inflict an equivalent Shock on each nearby Enemy When you Kill an Ignited Enemy, inflict an equivalent Ignite on each nearby Enemy Corrupted

Rarity: RARE Beast Hoof Leviathan Greaves Armour: 570 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.6821 Unique ID: 836fcebc791299de6b1e444084e5e10f1270bfda3ca54f55d6da7759e252a15c Item Level: 86 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-G-G LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 Ignites you inflict deal Damage 6% faster 5% increased Action Speed {fractured}+122 to maximum Life +58 to Intelligence +48% to Cold Resistance +47% to Lightning Resistance 28% increased Movement Speed 10% increased Movement Speed if you haven't been Hit Recently {crafted}20% increased Armour {crafted}+14 to maximum Life
